# China's DeepSeek launches V4 Flash and 1.6 trillion-parameter V4 Pro

Technology Apr 27, 2026

DeepSeek, a major player in China's AI scene, just launched two new language models: V4 Flash and V4 Pro. These models can process over 1 million tokens at once, so they're built for tackling massive documents or even entire codebases. The V4 Pro stands out as the biggest open-weight model yet, with 1.6 trillion parameters, beating out rivals like Moonshot AI

# Software Engineering Benchmark Verified (SWE-bench Verified)

A curated, human-verified subset of SWE-bench that tests models on resolving real GitHub issues from popular open-source Python repositories like Django, Flask, and scikit-learn.

## Top models on SWE-bench Verified — April 24, 2026

As of April 24, 2026, Claude Mythos Preview leads the SWE-bench Verified leaderboard with 93.9% , followed by Claude Opus 4.7 (Adaptive)(87.6%) and GPT-5.3 Codex(85%).

news_items.headline: 斯坦福伯克利英伟达联合发布Agent验证框架：扩展验证计算量超越GPT-5.5 - 鲸林向海
news_items.summary:
斯坦福伯克利英伟达联合发布Agent验证框架：扩展验证计算量超越GPT-5.5 - 鲸林向海

# 斯坦福伯克利英伟达联合发布Agent验证框架：扩展验证计算量超越GPT-5.5

17小时前 • AI产业动态• 阅读 71

本项目由斯坦福大学计算机科学博士生 Jacky Kwok 主导，核心贡献者包括伯克利 EECS 博士生 Shulu Li。通讯作者阵容包括：Ion Stoica（加州大学伯克利分校教授、Databricks 创始人）、Azalia Mirhoseini（斯坦福大学教授，曾任职于 DeepMind 与 Anthropic）以及 Marco Pavone（英伟达 AI 与自动驾驶研究总监）。

斯坦福、伯克利与英伟达联合推出了名为 LLM-as-a-Verifier的智能体验证框架。该方案作为一种通用的验证机制，能够与任意 Agent Harness 及模型无缝结合。

研究显示，通过扩展验证阶段的计算量（scaling verification compute），可显著提升智能体的整体性能。在最具影响力的 AI 编程基准测试 Terminal-Bench上，其表现甚至超越了 GPT-5.5 和 Claude Mythos！

LLM-as-a-Verifier 在 AI 编程基准测试 Terminal-Bench 和 SWE-Bench Verified 中均

# 超越Claude Mythos和GPT-5.5！斯坦福推出Agent验证框架「LLM-as-a-Verifier」

超越Claude Mythos和GPT-5.5！斯坦福推出Agent验证框架「LLM-as-a-Verifier」

本项目由斯坦福大学 CS 博士生 Jacky Kwok 负责，主要贡献者包括伯克利 EECS 博士生 Shulu Li。通讯作者为Ion Stoica（UC 伯克利教授、Databricks 创始人）、Azalia Mirhoseini（斯坦福教授，曾任职于 DeepMind 与 Anthropic）、以及 Marco Pavone（英伟达 AI 与自动驾驶研究总监）。

斯坦福、伯克利与英伟达联合提出 Agent 验证框架 LLM-as-a-Verifier。该方法是一种通用的验证机制，可与任意 Agent Harness 和模型结合。

研究表明，通过扩展验证阶段的计算量（scaling verification compute），可以显著提升 agent 整体性能，并在最有影响力的 AI 编程基准 Terminal-Bench 上超越 GPT-5.5

news_items.headline: DeepSeek V4 Released: Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0 — and It's Already on the API
news_items.summary:
# DeepSeek V4 Released: Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0 — and It's Already on the API - DEV Community

Published: 2026-04-24T04:51:46+00:00

## Summary

DeepSeek has released its Open-Source 1.6T MoE, 1M Context, Apache 2.0, and API pricing of $1.74 / $3.48 per million tokens for Pro. The release was timed to coincide with OpenAI's GPT-5.5. Both OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic protocols are supported. V4 introduces a hybrid attention mechanism: Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) + Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA), which reduces KV cache requirements by roughly an order of ma

news_items.headline: 刚刚，DeepSeek V4 双版本正式上线！|投资界
news_items.summary:
刚刚，DeepSeek V4 双版本正式上线！|投资界

### 资讯

### 7×24快讯

### 数据

### 会议

夜间模式

关 开

终于，全球 AI 圈等待了几个月的 DeepSeek V4，它终于来了！

今天上午，DeepSeek API 文档上线，让我们看到了新版本的「庐山真面目」。

此次，DeepSeek V4 按大小会有两个版本，分别是 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 和 DeepSeek-V4-Pro。上下文长度大家此前已经知道了，是 100 万 tokens。同时，输出长度*为 384K tokens。

就在刚刚，DeepSeek 官方正式宣布上线并开源「DeepSeek-V4 预览版」。

开源链接：https://huggingface.co/collections/deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4

根据官方的介绍，此次 DeepSeek-V4 在 Agent 能力、世界知识和推理性能上均实现国内与开源领域的*。

两个版本，V4-Pro 与 V4-Flash 的*上下文长度均为 1M，且同时支持「非思考模式」与「思考模式」，其中思考模式支持 reasoning_effort 参数设置思考强度（high/max）。对于复杂的 Agent 场景建议使用思考模式，并设置强度为 「max」。

DeepSeek-V4 发布同时

news_items.headline: Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform: Build and Deploy A2A Agents
news_items.summary:
# Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform: Build and Deploy A2A Agents - DEV Community

Published: 2026-04-26T00:09:17+00:00

## Summary

Google announced the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, a new platform for building and deploying AI agents, in 2026. The platform replaces Vertex AI, the platform used by tens of thousands of developers to build and deploy LLM applications, with a migration deadline and a new SDK. The new platform offers a comprehensive architecture that includes a low-code visual canvas for designing agent reasoning loops and workflows. Agent Studio replaces the older Agent

news_items.headline: Who controls AI systems once governments adopt them? – InclusiFund
news_items.summary:
Who controls AI systems once governments adopt them? – InclusiFund

Close Menu

Facebook X (Twitter) Instagram

Facebook X (Twitter) Instagram

Share

Governments across Africa are beginning to adopt AI systems into public services without clear answers to a basic question: who controls these systems once they are in use?

The risk is not theoretical. It is operational.

A system may meet procurement requirements. It may come with documentation, assurances, and technical safeguards. But once it is deployed into a government workflow, the harder question is no longer whether it is compliant on
